summary: Iteration 167 testing completed. Backend APIs (4 new FOH Concierge endpoints + Global Calendar day-detail) all pass (17/17 tests). Frontend has issues: FOH Concierge Hub panel fails to render when opened via sidebar/echoBus (module registered but not loading). Global Calendar day drill-down modal works correctly. /seed/plant Co-Build Studio works with screencast recorder button visible. /seed/admin shows Plant-a-seed CTA correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Panel fails to render when opened via sidebar or echoBus.openPanel(). Module is registered in panel-registry but not loading. Console shows '[Sidebar] Module foh-concierge-hub not in registry, allowing (dev-safe)'

integration_issues.issue: echoBus.openPanel('foh-concierge-hub') is called but panel does not render. Panel system may have issue with lazy loading this specific module.

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix FOH Concierge Hub panel not rendering - module is registered but not loading when opened via sidebar or echoBus
Verify panel-registry lazy loader for 'foh-concierge-hub' is working correctly
Check if FOHConciergeHub/index.tsx has any import errors preventing module load
critical_code_review_comments: FOHConciergeHub module exists at /app/client/modules/FOHConciergeHub/index.tsx and is registered in panel-registry at line 922, but panel system fails to render it
Console log shows module not in registry warning despite being registered - possible timing/initialization issue

success_rate.frontend: 60% - Main app loads, /seed/plant works, /seed/admin works, Global Calendar day-drill works, but FOH Concierge Hub panel fails to render

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs for iter167 all pass. FOH Concierge Hub panel has rendering issue - module registered but not loading. Global Calendar day drill-down modal works (right-click on day cell). /seed/plant screencast recorder button (data-testid='seed-rec-start') is visible. Area events and local places APIs are MOCKED (curated seed lists, not live data).

backend_passed: GET /api/global-calendar/day-detail - returns correct shape with department totals
GET /api/foh-concierge/local-places - returns 10 curated places, filters by category
GET /api/foh-concierge/in-house-schedule - returns 7-day schedule with ISO date keys
frontend_passed: /seed/plant Co-Build Studio loads with screencast recorder button visible
Global Calendar day drill-down modal opens on right-click with department sections
Echo Command Palette shows 'Open FOH Concierge Hub' suggestion when typing 'concierge'
frontend_failed: FOH Concierge Hub panel does not render when opened via sidebar or echoBus
